Callbacks for checking and building lists of dirty records in settings files.

# Purpose
This C header file provides declarations for two callback functions related to handling settings files. The function [`sync_util_is_dirty_cb`](<#sync_util_is_dirty_cb>) checks if there are unsaved changes (dirty records) in a given settings file and updates a boolean value at the provided `context` address. The function [`sync_util_build_dirty_list_cb`](<#sync_util_build_dirty_list_cb>) constructs a list of dirty items from a settings file and populates it into the provided `context`, which is expected to be an empty list. The file includes necessary headers for interacting with a blob database and settings files, and it contains a cautionary note about the handling of flags and status in `CommonTimelineItemHeader`.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `services/normal/blob_db/api.h`
- `services/normal/settings/settings_file.h`
